basics.name: MD. ZOBAER AHMED
basics.title: CS Undergrad, Aspiring Product Manager, Digital PM Trainee, Photographer
basics.summary: Computer Science undergraduate at United International University with strong focus on Product Management. Completing Digital Product Management program and seeking internship opportunities to apply learning in real projects. Long-term goal: combine CSE background and PM skills to build impactful technology products for Bangladesh.
